examples: The British press at its worst is intrusive, sanctimonious and spiteful.
In the wake of my death I know you will make all the usual sanctimonious noises and call upon the police to hold a swift and thorough inquiry.
Sanctimonious industry regulators might want to take a gander at the stock symbols for Corinthian Colleges, Inc.
Labour's former Europe minister Chris Bryant accused Mr Hughes of being "sanctimonious" in his contribution to the debate.
